name: PNC FINANCIAL SERVICES GROUP, INC.
business: PNC is a diversified financial services holding company with businesses in retail banking, corporate and institutional banking, and asset management. It offers deposit, credit, and fee-based products and services nationally through its primary subsidiary PNC Bank. The company serves retail customers, corporations, government entities, and high-net-worth individuals.

catalysts.event: Completed acquisition of FirstBank Holding Company
catalysts.sentence: On January 5, 2026, PNC completed its acquisition of FirstBank Holding Company, including its banking subsidiary, FirstBank.

catalysts.event: Conversion of FirstBank customers to PNC Bank expected this summer
catalysts.sentence: Conversion of FirstBank customers to PNC Bank is expected to occur this summer.

catalysts.event: Opening more than 200 new branches over five years and additional 100 branches
catalysts.sentence: In 2024, PNC announced it would be investing approximately $1.5 billion, over the next five years, to open more than 200 new branches in key locations... additionally, in the fourth quarter of 2025, PNC announced that it was increasing the investment by $0.5 billion, to open an additional 100 branches

catalysts.event: Renovation of 100% of branch network completed
catalysts.sentence: re-affirmed plans to complete the renovation of 100% of the branch network by 2029.
